## Slide 2
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD The Distributor's Position · Why Your Supply Partner Matters More Than Price ▶  Your Reputation Is Tied to What You Supply. When a belt fails in the field, your end customer calls you — not the factory. The right supply partner protects that relationship. Factory cannot be verified You have never visited the production site. You cannot show your end customer real evidence of the manufacturing process, QC system, or batch consistency. Your recommendation is based on trust — not evidence. Supply goes out of stock at the wrong moment A key customer needs urgent replacement. Your supplier cannot deliver in time. You lose the order — and the customer's confidence. The damage to the relationship is disproportionate to the value of the belt. Documentation is incomplete Your end customer needs a material certificate for an audit. The supplier cannot provide it — or takes two weeks. Your professional credibility with that customer is damaged. WHAT YIYI PROVIDES Factory photos & inspection records Real production photos, QA records, and robotic welding evidence — shareable with your end customers. 15,000m monthly capacity Stable, high-volume output. In-house wire drawing. Supply continuity even at peak demand. Complete document package Material certificate · dimensional report · ISO 9001 · production photos — issued with every order. Permanent spec retention Your belt specification stored permanently. Reorders confirmed same day. No delays on repeat supply. Ningjin Yiyi Mesh Belt Co., Ltd  |  info@yiyimeshbelt.com  |  www.yiyimeshbelt.com  |  WhatsApp: +86 134 5177 3742

## Slide 4
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD Supply Stability · 15,000m Monthly Output · In-House Raw Material Control ▶  Your Peak Season Is Not a Problem We Cannot Handle. Three factors make YIYI supply stable — independent of spot market pressure, seasonal demand, or raw material volatility. 01  PRODUCTION CAPACITY 27,000 m² Facility · 15,000m Monthly Output 280+ automated machines running continuously. 15,000m of belt produced every month. Capacity does not depend on seasonal hiring or manual labour availability. 02  IN-HOUSE WIRE DRAWING In-House Wire Drawing · Raw Coil to Finished Belt YIYI draws its own stainless steel wire from raw coil. No dependence on spot-market wire suppliers. When raw material prices fluctuate, YIYI's supply schedule and cost remain stable. 03  ROBOTIC WELDING 5 Robotic Welding Arms · Batch-to-Batch Consistency 5 robotic welding arms. Every belt produced to the same specification — whether it is the first order or the fiftieth. Batch consistency is not a promise. It is built into the process. Ningjin Yiyi Mesh Belt Co., Ltd  |  info@yiyimeshbelt.com  |  www.yiyimeshbelt.com  |  WhatsApp: +86 134 5177 3742

Robotic Welding · ±0.05mm Weld Point Tolerance image/jpeg;base64, Production · 280+ Automated Machines Material Certificate Alloy composition verified by XRF spectrometer on every incoming wire batch. SUS304 or SUS316L confirmed. Certificate issued with every shipment — ready to forward to your end customer. Dimensional Inspection Report Wire diameter · rod pitch · spiral pitch · belt width — all measured against the confirmed specification. Pre-shipment report issued on every order. ## Slide 8
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD Distributor Marketing Support · Neutral Packing · Shipping Options · Sales Materials ▶  We Supply the Belt. You Present It as Your Own. Everything listed on this page is available to distributors. No YIYI branding. No factory identification. NEUTRAL PACKING All shipments can be packed without any YIYI branding, factory name, or origin identification on the outer packaging. Plain brown carton  —  No logo, no factory name, no markings Custom label accepted  —  Your brand label applied on request Inner packing neutral  —  No YIYI marking on product or inner wrap SHIPPING OPTIONS Sea Freight FCL / LCL FCL from Tianjin or Qingdao. LCL consolidated weekly. Transit 20-35 days. Air Freight Urgent / Small Qty Door-to-door available. Transit 3-7 days to most destinations. Express Courier DHL · FedEx · UPS For samples, trial orders, small replacement quantities. 3-5 days. Rail China-Europe Between sea and air on cost and speed. Transit 18-22 days to EU hubs. SALES & MARKETING MATERIALS All materials provided without YIYI identification. Ready to use under your own brand. White-background product photos High-resolution product images on clean white background. No logos, no factory context. Ready for your catalogue, website, or customer presentations. Technical specification sheets Belt structure, pitch range, wire diameter, temperature rating, material grade — formatted as a clean one-page spec. No supplier identification. Material certificates XRF-verified alloy composition reports for SUS304 and SUS316L. Can be issued in generic format without factory name on request. Dimensional inspection reports Wire diameter, rod pitch, spiral pitch, width — all measured. Issued with every order. Available in unbranded format. Application reference data Temperature range, cleaning compatibility, drive system specifications — technical data for your sales team to present to end customers. ## Slide 9
NINGJIN YIYI MESH BELT CO., LTD First Cooperation Process · 5 Steps · Low Risk · Fast to Confirm ▶  First Order. Five Steps. Then Reorders Are Simple. The first order is the most work. After that, your specification is on file and reorders are confirmed the same day. 1 Send your product list Tell us which belt types you need — or the applications you serve. We confirm which products are available and in what specification range. → 2 Sample confirmation We produce a trial sample to your specification. You inspect and approve before any batch is produced. No financial commitment required at this stage. → 3 First batch with full QA First production batch. Material certificate · dimensional report · production photos · packing photos — all issued before shipment. → 4 Specification retained Your confirmed belt specification is stored permanently in our system. Every parameter — pitch, width, material, edge — on file. → 5 Reorders by order number Future orders: send your order number. Same specification. Confirmed same day. No re-measurement, no re-confirmation, no delays. ✓  Send us your product list. We confirm what we can supply within 12 hours. Ningjin Yiyi Mesh Belt Co., Ltd  |  info@yiyimeshbelt.com  |  www.yiyimeshbelt.com  |  WhatsApp: +86 134 5177 3742
